title: Eva spin offs you wouldnt mind being made
display_title: Eva spin offs you wouldnt mind being made
wikitext:
[]: Eva spin-offs you wouldn't mind being made             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Fri Feb 17, 2012 8:16 pm I wouldn't mind a slice-of-life series focused on the Bridge bunnies. Because they're awesome and need more characterization. Also make it an anime and have the English dub use Black Hyuga. I would pay damn good money for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Fri Feb 17, 2012 8:25 pm I’d like to see a Kaworu spin off, also a bridge bunny spin off would be pretty cool too.

[]:             Quote Post by deeRez » Fri Feb 17, 2012 8:28 pm The adventures of Pen-Pen the penguin. Episode 1: Lab Experiment Episode 2: You Can (Not) Fly Episode 3: The Woman who was Lonely Episode 4: When nude Shinji attacks

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Feb 17, 2012 9:12 pm Kensuke & Toji's Excellent Adventure.

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Fri Feb 17, 2012 9:44 pm I would love to see a series along the lines of Gendo: The College Years. Chronicle his love with Yui, all the way up to meeting Ritsuko and getting on the path towards the main series.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Feb 17, 2012 9:50 pm ONIAgent150 wrote: I would love to see a series along the lines of Gendo: The College Years. Chronicle his love with Yui, all the way up to meeting Ritsuko and getting on the path towards the main series.

[]:             Quote Post by ONIAgent150 » Fri Feb 17, 2012 9:59 pm Isn't there already an Evangelion hentai? (Because really, what else would a college years of Misato and Kaji be?)

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Fri Feb 17, 2012 11:48 pm An RPG made by BioWare or Obsidian staring Misato. That'd ought to put Evangelion on the map as more than a joke in the West.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Feb 18, 2012 12:25 am Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: An RPG made by CDProjekt staring Misato. That'd ought to put Evangelion on the map as more than a joke in the West.

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Sat Feb 18, 2012 12:33 am Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: An RPG made by Bethesda starring Misato. That'd ought to put Evangelion on the map as more than a joke in the West.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Feb 18, 2012 1:14 am Sgt. Griff wrote: Comply with my edit and not the other one, and you have my money.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Feb 18, 2012 6:17 am The adventures of that UN Captain from episode 8.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sat Feb 18, 2012 8:17 am an angel sitcom.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Feb 18, 2012 10:44 am How about this: "Asuka Explains it All" This I'd watch. Why not?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sat Feb 18, 2012 12:00 pm I'd like to see young Misato as a Magical Girl with a talking Pen Pen as her familiar.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sat Feb 18, 2012 2:34 pm Asuka vs. Kaworu in a religious debate. Asuka could be a Dawkins-like atheist, while Kaworu is a batshit crazy fundamentalist who makes Rick Santorum seem normal.

[]:             Quote Post by classified-zerogoki » Sat Feb 18, 2012 5:58 pm A slife-of-life comedy with Moe Eva Units!

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sat Feb 18, 2012 6:52 pm Third Impact: The Zombie Aftermath Oh wait, we tried that one and it went to shit :(

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 18, 2012 9:08 pm Someone wrote: The adventures of that UN Captain from episode 8.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Feb 18, 2012 9:50 pm driftking18594 wrote: Asuka vs. Kaworu in a religious debate. Asuka could be a Dawkins-like atheist, while Kaworu is a batshit crazy fundamentalist who makes Rick Santorum seem normal.
summary:
[]: Eva spin-offs you wouldn't mind being made             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Fri Feb 17, 2012 8:16 pm I wouldn't mind a slice-of-life series focused on the Bridge bunnies. Because they're awesome and need more characterization. Also make it an anime and have the English dub use Black Hyuga. I would pay damn good money for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger
